rationale: Earth & Environmental L4 splits each L3 into named subsystems, methods, or signal classes. Climate science decomposes CMIP class + paleoclimate proxies + sensitivity by feedback + extremes by hazard. Oceanography by water-mass + biogeochemical cycle + sea-ice physics. Remote sensing by sensor modality + ML.

leaves.name: CMIP-Class GCMs
leaves.tagline: CMIP-class GCMs, model intercomparison, CMIP6/CMIP7 ensemble analysis.

leaves.name: Regional Climate Downscaling
leaves.tagline: Regional climate downscaling, dynamical + statistical downscaling, ML emulators.

leaves.name: Km-Scale Storm-Resolving Models
leaves.tagline: Km-scale storm-resolving models, ICON/GCM at 1-3 km, DYAMOND.

leaves.name: Ice Core & Marine Sediment Proxies
leaves.tagline: Ice cores, marine sediment proxies, deglaciation records.

leaves.name: Tree-Ring & Last-Millennium Reconstructions
leaves.tagline: Tree-ring reconstructions, last-millennium climate, dendroclimatology.

leaves.name: Climate Sensitivity Estimation
leaves.tagline: Climate sensitivity estimation, feedback analysis, ECS bounds.

leaves.name: Event Attribution
leaves.tagline: Extreme-event attribution, World Weather Attribution method, attribution of heatwaves.

leaves.name: Heatwaves & Megadroughts
leaves.tagline: Heatwaves, compound heat-drought events, megadroughts.

leaves.name: Climate Impact Projections
leaves.tagline: Climate impact projections, sectoral impacts (agriculture, health, infrastructure).

leaves.name: Tropical Cyclone Future Risk
leaves.tagline: Tropical cyclone intensification under warming, hurricane risk projections.

leaves.name: NWP & Data Assimilation
leaves.tagline: NWP, data assimilation (4D-Var, EnKF), ML weather models (GraphCast-class).

leaves.name: Jet Stream & Blocking Dynamics
leaves.tagline: Jet stream + blocking dynamics, large-scale circulation regimes.

leaves.name: Aerosol-Cloud Interactions
leaves.tagline: Aerosol-cloud interactions, indirect aerosol forcing, cloud feedbacks.

leaves.name: Cloud Microphysics
leaves.tagline: Cloud microphysics, mixed-phase clouds, ice nucleation in clouds.

leaves.name: Boundary Layer Meteorology
leaves.tagline: Atmospheric boundary layer, ABL dynamics, ABL clouds, ABL parameterization.

leaves.name: Tropospheric & Stratospheric Ozone
leaves.tagline: Tropospheric and stratospheric ozone chemistry, chemistry-climate coupling.

leaves.name: AMOC & Overturning Circulation
leaves.tagline: AMOC, ocean overturning circulation, deep-water formation.

leaves.name: Mesoscale & Submesoscale Ocean Dynamics
leaves.tagline: Mesoscale eddies, submesoscale dynamics, ocean turbulence.

leaves.name: Ocean Carbon Uptake
leaves.tagline: Ocean carbon uptake, anthropogenic carbon penetration, ocean carbon flux.

leaves.name: Ocean Acidification & Biogeochemical Impacts
leaves.tagline: Ocean acidification, calcifying-organism impacts, biogeochemical responses.

leaves.name: Arctic Sea Ice Decline
leaves.tagline: Arctic sea ice decline, Arctic amplification, sea-ice physics modeling.

leaves.name: Antarctic Ice Shelves & Ocean
leaves.tagline: Antarctic ice shelves, ice-shelf melt, Antarctic ocean processes.

leaves.name: Estuary & Coastal Shelf Dynamics
leaves.tagline: Estuarine processes, shelf dynamics, coastal upwelling, ocean dead zones.

leaves.name: Runoff & Hydrological Modeling
leaves.tagline: Runoff modeling, catchment hydrology, distributed hydrological models.

leaves.name: Aquifer Dynamics & Groundwater Modeling
leaves.tagline: Aquifer dynamics, groundwater modeling, sustainable groundwater use.

leaves.name: Snowpack & Mountain Hydrology
leaves.tagline: Snowpack physics, mountain hydrology, glacier melt contribution to streamflow.

leaves.name: Drought + Flood Hazard Modeling
leaves.tagline: Drought + flood hazard modeling, flash floods, urban flood modeling.

leaves.name: Tectonics & Continental Dynamics
leaves.tagline: Tectonics, orogeny, continental dynamics, lithospheric deformation.

leaves.name: Subduction Zone Processes
leaves.tagline: Subduction zone processes, arc magmatism, slow earthquakes at subduction zones.

leaves.name: Igneous Petrology
leaves.tagline: Igneous petrology, mantle melting, basalt and granite petrogenesis.

leaves.name: Metamorphic Petrology
leaves.tagline: Metamorphic petrology, P-T-t paths, HP/UHP metamorphism.

leaves.name: Basin Analysis & Sedimentary Systems
leaves.tagline: Basin analysis, sedimentary systems, source-to-sink, sequence stratigraphy.

leaves.name: Landscape Evolution & Sediment Transport
leaves.tagline: Landscape evolution, sediment transport modeling, erosion-uplift coupling.

leaves.name: Earthquake Source Physics & Slow Slip
leaves.tagline: Earthquake source physics, slow slip events, tremor, fault rupture mechanics.

leaves.name: Earthquake Early Warning & Hazard
leaves.tagline: Earthquake early warning, seismic hazard assessment, ML for earthquake detection.

leaves.name: Mantle & Core Tomography
leaves.tagline: Mantle + core tomography, deep Earth dynamics, lower-mantle structure.

leaves.name: Geodynamo & Geomagnetic Field
leaves.tagline: Geodynamo, geomagnetic field, paleomagnetism, magnetic anomalies.

leaves.name: Stable Isotope Geochemistry
leaves.tagline: Stable isotope geochemistry, isotope tracers for processes, clumped isotopes.

leaves.name: Geochronology & Dating Methods
leaves.tagline: Geochronology, U-Pb, 40Ar/39Ar, cosmogenic nuclide dating.

leaves.name: Biogeochemical Cycles
leaves.tagline: Biogeochemical cycles, C, N, P, S coupled cycling at low temperature.

leaves.name: Geobiology & Microbial Geochemistry
leaves.tagline: Geobiology, microbial geochemistry, early-Earth biogeochemistry.

leaves.name: Land Carbon Sink
leaves.tagline: Land carbon sink, terrestrial CO2 uptake, fire-driven emissions.

leaves.name: Soil Carbon & Permafrost Carbon
leaves.tagline: Soil carbon flux, permafrost carbon, soil respiration responses.

leaves.name: Nitrogen Deposition & Cycling
leaves.tagline: Nitrogen deposition, terrestrial N cycling, anthropogenic N inputs.

leaves.name: Terrestrial Vegetation Models
leaves.tagline: Terrestrial vegetation models, DGVMs, land carbon-climate feedback modeling.

leaves.name: Landsat + Sentinel for LULC
leaves.tagline: Landsat + Sentinel for land-use/land-cover, deforestation monitoring, cropland mapping.

leaves.name: Ocean Color & Coastal Satellite RS
leaves.tagline: Ocean color RS, chlorophyll-a estimation, coastal satellite remote sensing.

leaves.name: InSAR & Surface Change Monitoring
leaves.tagline: InSAR for surface deformation, subsidence monitoring, glacier velocity mapping.

leaves.name: Soil Moisture from Microwave RS
leaves.tagline: Soil moisture from microwave RS, SMAP, root-zone soil moisture retrievals.

leaves.name: LiDAR for Forest Structure
leaves.tagline: LiDAR for forest structure, GEDI, airborne LiDAR for biomass.

leaves.name: Hyperspectral Mineral & Vegetation
leaves.tagline: Hyperspectral mapping of minerals + vegetation traits, EnMAP, PRISMA.

leaves.name: Foundation Models for Earth Observation
leaves.tagline: Foundation models for Earth observation, geospatial foundation models, Prithvi-class.

leaves.name: ML for Deforestation & Fire Mapping
leaves.tagline: ML for deforestation + fire mapping, burn-area detection, near-real-time fire.

leaves.name: MBR & Advanced Oxidation for Wastewater
leaves.tagline: MBR + advanced oxidation for wastewater, AOP, nutrient recovery.

leaves.name: PM2.5 & Emission Control
leaves.tagline: PM2.5 emission control engineering, indoor air quality, particulate scrubbing.

leaves.name: PFAS & Groundwater Remediation
leaves.tagline: PFAS treatment, groundwater remediation, soil remediation for emerging contaminants.

leaves.name: Energy System Modeling
leaves.tagline: Energy-system modeling, decarbonization pathways, sector-coupling models.

leaves.name: Decarbonization Scenarios & IAMs
leaves.tagline: Decarbonization scenarios, integrated assessment models, mitigation pathways.

leaves.name: Urban Metabolism & LCA
leaves.tagline: Urban metabolism, urban LCA, industrial ecology of cities, sustainable cities research.

uncovered_concerns: Natural Hazards & Disaster Science from the L2 fold into earthquake-source-physics, landscape-evolution (landslides), and climate-extremes leaves rather than getting their own L4.
Polar & Cryospheric Science L2 papers fold into sea-ice + snow + glacier + Antarctic ice-shelves L4 leaves.
